title: Epic Cobblepack
description: This project turns Cobblemon into an interesting adventure. Heavy focus on Vanilla+ mods, explore the world with your furry friends!!!
body:
This modpack is built around Cobblemon, a Pokémon-inspired creature system for Minecraft that adds catchable, trainable, and battle-ready monsters that naturally generate across the world. Cobblemon integrates directly with vanilla mechanics, allowing players to explore, battle, and build without changing the core sandbox structure.

To support progression, the pack includes Cobbreeding for structured breeding mechanics, useful backpacks for expanded inventory management, and Waystones for fast and reliable travel across long distances. A minimap provides situational awareness during exploration, and Joy of Painting adds creative tools for player-made art within bases and towns. Numerous additional quality-of-life and world-enhancing mods are included to improve structure variety, travel flow, and survival convenience.

The result is an exploration-heavy Cobblemon experience: new structures to discover, new regions to traverse, and efficient tools that make long expeditions practical without reducing the challenge of progression. Players can travel widely to find specific Cobblemon spawns, establish fast-travel networks, build functional bases, and engage in long-term creature collecting and training.

This pack is designed to feel close to vanilla while adding meaningful systems that support Cobblemon gameplay and broaden the world with better exploration, better travel, and better utility.
